CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'New') || ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'For Owner Review') || ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'Wait / Hold')), IF(Last_Payment_Date__c <> null, Last_Payment_Date__c, IF(Account_Open_date__c <> null, Account_Open_date__c, IF(Acknowledgement_date__c <> null, Acknowledgement_date__c, null))), null)
CustomField.label: Debt Due As Of Date
